# nightshift-ai

## Tutorials

Getting started with sdlc — Install the sdlc plugin, onboard a repo, and drive your first Jira story to an open PR — docs/tutorials/getting-started-with-sdlc.md

## Reference

Changelog — Release notes are generated from commit messages by nx release; this page points to the canonical GitHub Releases and plugin changelogs. — docs/changelog/index.md
